meaning: n.[植]桃花心木,其木材,红褐色
examples: "It is a mahogany splinter, "said the other.
The woman exclaimed, and thence the proverb: It is so mahogany!
The word "mahogany" can be understood, in Danish, as having two meanings.
Kutcher and Kutcher utilized Mahogany, Brazilian Cherry and recycled Redwood woods throughout the house.
Remove 200-year-old Amazon mahogany or Congolese sapele trees and the species may go locally extinct.
